twitter_thread: 27 Fit Check tools reviewed: 22 just log workouts, 5 predict outcomes. The difference is $100/month.
Integrating Fit Check with Garmin or Strava can save 2 hours/week in data entry.
Fitstar, JEFIT, and StrongLifts lead in predictive modeling, with 85% accuracy in workout planning.
Ignoring nutritional data in Fit Check software can lead to 30% less progress.
JEFIT's community features drove 40% more engagement than other top Fit Check tools.
Using Fit Check to analyze routines can increase progress by 25% in 6 weeks.
What metric has Fit Check software helped you improve most? #fitcheck #software
